title: Jackie's Weaponry Mod
description: A mod that adds way to much strong and powerful weaponry. This mod adds weaponry with modded and vanilla materials.
body:
# Notice

I, Jackie The Coder, quit modding. Because no one thanks me enough or support me to feel like I have made what i should have.

If you wish to have my mods, sorry but you have to support me on patreon or Ko-fi once it's ready.


I, Lucile, have decided to to continue the mod myself via using the existing code to learn how to register new stuff as they did make it easy to edit and add new things. New fixed and debugged versions will be released here and on other sites.


# Weapons
We worked hard to add skins and varients of our scythe weapon. In 1.0.3-public-release we made the scythe actually big and look like one.
1.5v2 has new weapons for fabric 1.20.1.
# Info
We release public versions of the mod instead of our personal ones on the server. You can edit any texture or do whatever to the mod it is OTE (Open To Edit) License.
# NBT
We use betternbt NBT Data for the skins as a way of getting them. You can find them in a video on the creator's channel.
